name: AIAntenna Design Space Exploration
description: Tests creating an AIAntenna and performing parametric sweep
prompt: Use AIAntenna to explore how patch length affects the resonant frequency of a rectangular microstrip patch at 2.4 GHz. Sweep the length parameter across its valid range and plot the result. Provide the complete MATLAB script.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Uses design() with ForAI flag to create AIAntenna
assertions.expected: Code calls design() with 3 arguments: (1) a supported catalog antenna type, (2) a target frequency, (3) ForAI set to true — either as ForAI=true or "ForAI", true. Must not use em.ai.AIAntenna() constructor directly.

assertions.description: Does not use deprecated em.ai.AIAntenna() direct constructor
Uses tunableRanges for parameter bounds
Calls resonantFrequency in sweep loop

name: AIAntenna Export and Validation
description: Tests exporting AIAntenna to catalog element and running full-wave validation
prompt: Create an AI-based PIFA at 5.8 GHz, check its bandwidth, then export to a real antenna and compute impedance across 5-6.5 GHz.Provide the complete MATLAB script.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Uses design(..., ForAI=true) to create AI model
Uses exportAntenna to convert to catalog element
Computes bandwidth from AI model
Runs full-wave impedance on exported antenna

name: 3D Pattern Reconstruction from 2D Slices
description: Tests using patternFromAI to reconstruct 3D pattern from simulated 2D cuts
prompt: Design a patch antenna at 1.575 GHz, extract its elevation and azimuth pattern cuts, then use patternFromAI to reconstruct the full 3D radiation pattern.Provide the complete MATLAB script.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Uses patternElevation or patternAzimuth for slice extraction
Calls patternFromAI with correct arguments
Specifies AngleConvention for clarity
Input slices are row vectors with 1-degree spacing
assertions.expected: Transpose (.' or transpose) used to create row vectors, angles use integer spacing

name: 3D Pattern from Imported Measured Data
description: Tests workflow for importing 2D measured data and reconstructing 3D pattern
prompt: I have two CSV files with measured antenna pattern data: elevation_cut.csv and azimuth_cut.csv. Each has columns [angle_deg, gain_dBi]. Show me how to import them and reconstruct the 3D pattern using patternFromAI.Provide the complete MATLAB script.

assertions.description: Shows readmatrix or readtable for CSV import
assertions.expected: readmatrix or readtable used for data import

assertions.description: Transposes data to row vectors
assertions.expected: Data formatted as 1-by-N row vectors using .' or transpose()

assertions.description: Addresses intersection consistency check (3 dB constraint)
assertions.expected: Mentions or handles the 3 dB intersection constraint between slices

assertions.description: Calls patternFromAI
Specifies AngleConvention

name: AIAntenna Optimization with OptimizerTRSADEA
description: Tests using OptimizerTRSADEA with AIAntenna for multi-objective optimization
prompt: Optimize a horn antenna at 10 GHz using OptimizerTRSADEA to maximize gain and bandwidth while keeping resonant frequency within 2% of the target. Use ±15% bounds around defaults and add a constraint that FeedHeight must be less than Height. Provide the complete MATLAB script.

assertions.description: Uses design(..., ForAI=true) to create AI model
Creates OptimizerTRSADEA with bounds matrix
Sets CustomEvaluationFunction
Sets GeometricConstraints with linear inequality
Calls optimize or optimizeWithPlots
Retrieves best member data

name: Full-Factorial Parametric Sweep with AIAntenna
description: Tests using combinations() for multi-parameter design space exploration
prompt: Use AIAntenna to perform a full-factorial parametric sweep on a horn antenna at 10 GHz. Vary Width, Height, and FeedHeight within ±15% of defaults, compute resonant frequency, bandwidth, for each combination, then filter results to find designs with fres within 2% of 10 GHz and maximum bandwidth. Provide the complete MATLAB script.

assertions.description: Uses design(..., ForAI=true) to create AI model
Uses combinations() for factorial grid
Checks matching status before trusting resonantFrequency
assertions.expected: bandwidth matching status checked (Matched/Almost/Not Matched) before computing fRes

assertions.description: Handles unmatched designs (NaN or skip)
assertions.expected: NaN assigned or iteration skipped for unmatched designs

assertions.description: Filters results by frequency and bandwidth criteria
assertions.expected: Results filtered to find designs with resonant frequency within 2% of 10 GHz and selects for maximum bandwidth using logical indexing, find, max, or sort
